message: Run created: refactor doc name format in doc folder consistent
Task started: Analyze current documentation file names in docs folder
Task started: Define consistent naming format for docs files

details.text: Created `docs/docs-naming-convention.md` specifying **kebab-case** (lowercase, hyphen-separated, `.md` extension) as the standard for all doc files, aligned with the ~85% of existing docs that already follow this pattern. The convention document includes examples of correct/incorrect names and clear rules.
